task.summary: Implement GitHub-only public trust route pages, narrowed contact form options, and privacy-safe no-network measurement contract.

model_or_worker.name: Codex GPT-5 desktop session with subagent review
model_or_worker.role: product implementer, verifier, and governance recorder

reasoning_profile.change_policy: GitHub-only product branch. No Cloudflare deploy, DNS mutation, mailbox change, D1 migration, or production lead write.

input_packet_summary.summary: Owner confirmed real Czech route pages, no public phone, deferred photo asset, later Cloudflare Web Analytics, and GitHub approval before Cloudflare deploy.

output_pointer.summary: Added /kontakt, /sluzby, /portfolio, /soukromi; narrowed contact form options; added no-network measurement and base-aware links.

implementation_summary.measurement: Local CustomEvent contract only; no analytics network call.
implementation_summary.deployment: Pushed to GitHub branch codex/radeq-ab-c-preview; Cloudflare not deployed.

review_findings.summary: GitHub Pages base path was broken for new absolute CTA links.
review_findings.resolution: Added withBaseHref and applied it to hero, route page, and showcase links; GitHub Pages dist href checks passed.

review_findings.summary: Click measurement events were declared and tagged but not emitted.
review_findings.resolution: Added MeasurementTracker to emit local radeq:measurement CustomEvents from data-track clicks.

verification_evidence.evidence: npm.cmd run typecheck: 0 errors, 0 warnings, 0 hints.
npm.cmd test: 11 test files and 58 tests passed.
npm.cmd run build completed with known Vite large chunk warning.
DEPLOY_TARGET=github-pages npm.cmd run build completed with known Vite large chunk warning.
Static dist checks confirmed /radeq base prefix for new GitHub Pages links.
npm.cmd run test:e2e: 21 Playwright tests passed.
git diff --check passed with only LF-to-CRLF working-copy notices.

prompt_or_input_delta.summary: Review findings caused the implementation to add base-aware internal link handling and a no-network click measurement tracker before commit.
prompt_or_input_delta.rollback_path: Revert Radeq product commit dbb59d5 and this Autopilot governance commit.
